sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users WHERE name LIKE #{namePattern} AND email LIKE #{emailPattern} AND status IN (#{statusActive}, #{statusPending}) AND department_id IN (#{deptIds}) AND id NOT IN (#{excludeIds})
templateSql:
<bind name="namePattern" value="name == null ? '%' : '%' + name + '%'"/>
<bind name="emailPattern" value="email == null ? '%' : '%' + email + '%'"/>
<bind name="statusActive" value="'active'"/>
<bind name="statusPending" value="'pending'"/>
<bind name="today" value="new java.util.Date()"/>
SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users
<where>
    <if test="enableNameFilter">
        AND name LIKE #{namePattern}
    </if>
    <if test="enableEmailFilter">
        AND email LIKE #{emailPattern}
    </if>
    <choose>
        <when test="filterMode == 'active'">
            AND status = #{statusActive}
        </when>
        <when test="filterMode == 'pending'">
            AND status = #{statusPending}
        </when>
        <when test="filterMode == 'all'">
            AND status IN (#{statusActive}, #{statusPending})
        </when>
    </choose>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="excludeIds != null and excludeIds.size() > 0">
        AND id NOT IN
        <foreach collection="excludeIds" item="eid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{eid}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
